protocols.Paper_title: A novel method to recover inclusion body protein from recombinant E. coli fed-batch processes based on phage ΦX174-derived lysis protein E
protocols.Evidence: “The expression of lysis gene E and thus the start of E-lysis was induced by increasing the cultivation temperature to 42 °C.”

protocols.Paper_title: A novel method to recover inclusion body protein from recombinant E. coli fed-batch processes based on phage ΦX174-derived lysis protein E
protocols.Evidence: “A … sample was centrifuged … The supernatant was put on −20 °C … while the pellet was washed, centrifuged again, and then dried … at 105 °C.”

protocols.Paper_title: A novel method to recover inclusion body protein from recombinant E. coli fed-batch processes based on phage ΦX174-derived lysis protein E
protocols.Evidence: “A duplicate of … fermentation broth was centrifuged … and washed once… samples taken before the E-lysis phase were homogenized”

protocols.Paper_title: A novel method to recover inclusion body protein from recombinant E. coli fed-batch processes based on phage ΦX174-derived lysis protein E
protocols.Evidence: “samples … were … reduced on a heating block … in a buffer described by Laemmli (1970)… loaded onto sodium dodecyl sulfate polyacrylamide gel electrophoresis (SDS) gels”

protocols.Paper_title: A novel method to recover inclusion body protein from recombinant E. coli fed-batch processes based on phage ΦX174-derived lysis protein E
protocols.Evidence: “One milliliter of each of these samples was centrifuged … The supernatant was discarded”

protocols.Paper_title: A novel method to recover inclusion body protein E. coli from recombinant fed-batch processes based on phage X174-derived lysis protein E
